tagline: Complete Pool Service You Can Trust — From New Builds to Full Restorations

hero.headline: 46 Years Keeping Brevard Pools Perfect
hero.subheadline: Since 1980, the Stanton family has built, repaired, and maintained pools across Merritt Island and the Space Coast. From new construction to weekly upkeep, we handle it all so you can skip the work and enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Experts<br class="hidden md:block"> for Every Need
services.subtitle: From breaking ground on a brand-new pool to keeping your existing one crystal clear, Stanton Pools handles every stage of pool ownership with 46 years of proven expertise.

cards.title: Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom new pool builds designed for Florida homes, from consultation and design through excavation, plumbing, and finishing. Your dream backyard starts here.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Complete renovation including resurfacing, tile replacement, coping upgrades, modern lighting, and deck improvements that transform aging pools into stunning retreats.

cards.title: Pool Resurfacing
cards.description: Expert application of pebble, plaster, and aggregate finishes that restore beauty and extend the life of your pool shell for years to come.

cards.title: Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Reliable weekly and bi-weekly maintenance that keeps water crystal clear and chemically balanced. Protecting your investment and ensuring safe swimming year-round.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Install
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and automation controls diagnosed and repaired. Full equipment upgrades to improve efficiency and cut energy costs.

cards.title: Structural Crack Repair
cards.description: Professional assessment and repair of pool shell cracks, leaks, and structural damage using proven techniques that restore watertight integrity.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Best Pool Yet

steps.title: Schedule a Free Inspection
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We'll visit your property, assess your pool's condition, and provide an honest, no-pressure estimate within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Get to Work
steps.description: Our experienced crew arrives on schedule with the right equipment. Whether it's a build, repair, or weekly cleaning, we treat your pool like our own.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool, Worry-Free
steps.description: Dive into a pool that's always clean, safe, and ready. With 46 years of expertise behind every visit, your satisfaction is guaranteed.

about.label: Why Brevard Trusts Stanton Pools
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 1980 — Your Neighbors, Not a Corporation
about.description: Jeff and Martita Stanton have spent over four decades building pools and relationships across Brevard County. As a family-owned business, we're personally invested in every project. We know the challenges Florida pools face — salt air corrosion, hurricane prep, year-round chemistry — and we've been solving them since before most competitors existed. Our team treats your pool like their own because our reputation depends on it.

features.title: Licensed & Insured FL Contractor
features.description: Fully licensed pool/spa contractor with 46 years of continuous operation and comprehensive liability coverage.

features.title: Honest, Upfront Pricing
features.description: No hidden fees, no surprise charges, no upselling tactics. We quote fair and stick to it — that's how we earned our A+ BBB rating.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with our work? We come back and make it right at no charge. Over 46 years, that promise has never changed.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing. No Surprises. No Contracts.
pricing.subtitle: Get a straightforward quote for exactly what your pool needs. No long-term commitments — just honest work at honest prices.

guarantee.headline: Our "Stanton Standard" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service we perform, call us within 48 hours and we'll come back to make it right at absolutely no additional cost. We've stood behind this promise for 46 years because we believe great work speaks for itself. Your pool, your peace of mind — guaranteed.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new maintenance clients are scheduled within one week. For repairs and emergencies, we often respond same-day or next-day. For construction and remodeling, we'll schedule a consultation within a few days to get your project moving.

faqs.question: Do you handle both new builds and repairs?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Stanton Pools is a full-service pool company. We build new pools from scratch, remodel and resurface existing ones, handle all equipment repairs, and provide ongoing weekly maintenance. Whatever your pool needs, we do it.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. We hold Florida Pool/Spa Contractor License #CPC1459682, carry full liability insurance, and maintain an A+ rating with the Better Business Bureau. We've been continuously licensed since 1980.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Brevard County including Merritt Island, Melbourne, West Melbourne, Palm Bay, Titusville, Cocoa, Cocoa Beach, Rockledge, Viera, Satellite Beach, and Indian Harbour Beach.

faqs.question: Why choose Stanton Pools over a larger company?
faqs.answer: With 46 years in business, we combine the expertise of a large firm with the personal attention of a family operation. Jeff and Martita Stanton are personally involved in every project. You'll never be treated like just another account number.

testimonials.name: Long-Time Client
testimonials.text: I have used Stanton Pools for over 6 years. They are very professional, knowledgeable, and helpful. Their commitment to quality workmanship is evident in everything they do.

testimonials.name: Melbourne Homeowner
testimonials.text: The craftsmanship is exceptional with meticulous tile and plaster work. The detail and pride in their work is evident throughout the finished product. I would give 10 stars if I could.

testimonials.name: Brevard Resident
testimonials.text: What sets Stanton Pools apart is their commitment to honesty and integrity. Fair pricing with no hidden fees or upselling tactics. Communication was outstanding from start to finish.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool You
Can Actually Count On?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation estimate from Brevard County's most experienced pool team. 46 years of trusted service — one phone call away.
